name: redwood-spectra
description: Mateu renderer built on the Oracle Redwood Spectra Shell (Oracle JET 19 + Spectra UI, loaded from Oracle's CDN). Reuses the shared libs/mateu wire client + DTOs.

scripts.copy: tsc && vite build && mv dist/index.html dist/_index.html && cp -rf dist/* ../../../../../backend/shared/frontend/redwood-spectra-lit/src/main/resources/META-INF/resources && cp -rf dist/* ../../../../../backend/shared/frontend/redwood-spectra-lit/src/main/resources/static
